poll_interval.title: Polling Interval
poll_interval.hint: How often to check for device updates (in seconds)

settings.token_info: The access token is automatically refreshed when it expires. The app handles this entirely in the background without any action needed from you. Only when the refresh token expires (after a longer period of inactivity) will you need to log in again. You will recognize this when the device shows as "unavailable" in Homey.
settings.reauth_intro: You can log in again to Bosch HomeCom to renew your authentication.
settings.reauth_step1: Copy the login URL and open it in your browser:
settings.reauth_step2: Log in with your Bosch HomeCom Easy account
settings.reauth_step3: After logging in, you will see a page that cannot load. Copy the code from the URL:
